SEARCH

Interface Observer

All Known Implementing Classes:
Entity, EntityHrac, EntityPrisera, EntityPriseraDiviak, EntityPriseraDivozienka, EntityPriseraHad, EntityPriseraJezibaba, EntityPriseraKobylka, EntityPriseraKralik, EntityPriseraLesij, EntityPriseraMumia, EntityPriseraPavuk, EntityPriseraPotkan, EntityPriseraRusalka, EntityPriseraSkorpion, EntityPriseraTopivec, EntityPriseraUhor, EntityPriseraVlk, EntityPriseraVodnik
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface Observer
Rozhranie Observer - vzor Observer pre sledovanie zmeny zdravia. Pouziva sa na notifikaciu GUI o zmene zdravia entity. Funkcne rozhranie (functional interface) pre pouzitie s lambdami.
See Also:

    void
    aktualizuj(int aktualneHP)
    Metoda volana pri zmene zdravia sledovanej entity.
